positive: Stylized and vibrant vector illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a cluster of bioluminescent mushrooms and exotic foliage surrounding a small, gently glowing portal. Composition is central and balanced, featuring deep greens, magentas, and electric blues contrasted with soft earth tones. Clean, bold outlines and sharp edges are crucial, giving it a modern tattoo or psychedelic poster aesthetic. The style should evoke the spirit of Art Nouveau mixed with contemporary botanical etching. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, ensuring strong silhouettes and high visibility. Studio lighting, hyper-detailed, 8k, high contrast.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, artifacts, blurry, grain, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, human face, text-based, grainy, messy, photorealistic, bokeh, gradient background
